title: Pretty Woman
overview: Elderly ladies rise to the challenge of staging a play and struggle to launch a theater company.  Based on the actual amateur theater company "Theatrical Company Hono" in Fujieda City, Shizuoka Prefecture, where the presiding officers and performers are composed of elderly women. They have been performing stage plays about issues related to the elderly for a long time.
